case_title: WILDER BARTON VS BALIDIO JOSEPH A

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY WILDER BARTON AS TO DEFENDANT BALIDIO JOSEPH A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-23-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01 TRIAL OF MAR-02-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILDER BARTON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALIDIO JOSEPH A $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $908.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED, NOT AT THAT ADDRESS.
